title: lapsana communis subsp. grandiflora
intro: Lapsana communis subsp. grandiflora, also known as the large-flowered navelwort or greater selfheal, is a subspecies of the Lapsana communis plant, a member of the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of Lapsana communis subsp. grandiflora include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. Lapsana communis subsp. grandiflora can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
